name: You know my name?
short_description: A short visual novel about finding your name and a girl in the fog.
detailed_description:
SHORT GRIM STORIES


About the Game

A short story about a girl who has forgotten her name.
But it seems she lost something else along with her name. And she's losing it even now.

The novella is more an experiment with abstractions than a standard story.
Sources of inspiration: novellas about milk and the cartoon "Hedgehog in the Fog".

Features


  • A kinetic novel about the defense mechanisms of the psyche
  • A psychedelic narrative that opens up a wide range of interpretations
  • Short duration (10-15 minutes)
